name: Swiss Cheese, Sour Cream and Chive Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a basic omelet.
2. Place the sour cream and Swiss cheese inside the omelet.
3. Add salt, pepper, and chopped chives.
4. Fold and serve.
Variation on Swiss Cheese and Sour Cream Omelet in The Frugal Gourmet cookbook. (KXMT69B)
